confirmed_task: Go to https://example.com and report the exact text of the H1 heading.
Open https://www.iana.org/help/example-domains and report the registered example second-level domains (the .com, .net, .org ones).
On https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/HTTP_404 what year was the 404 status code introduced according to the page's history / explanation? Report the year only.
Open https://httpbin.org/status/200 and report the HTTP status displayed or returned. Use the page response.
Go to https://news.ycombinator.com, find the link to the page that lists the past front-page stories ('past'), open it, and report the title of the link at the very top of that list.
Open https://www.wikipedia.org, click the link for the English Wikipedia, then search for the article 'Chrome DevTools Protocol' and report the first sentence of that article.
Go to https://duckduckgo.com, type the query 'site:example.com' into the search box and submit it. Report the title of the first organic result.
Open https://httpbin.org/forms/post. Fill the customer name field with 'Bench User', pick pizza size 'medium', check 'cheese' as a topping, then submit. Report the JSON 'form' object echoed back.
Open https://nowsecure.nl/. Wait for the page to finish its bot check and report the success message text shown after the check passes.
Open https://bot.sannysoft.com/ and report whether the WebDriver test row shows 'passed' or 'failed' (the cell value).
